enter_plan_mode.description: Enter planning mode. No tool — text only. Design approach, then exit_plan_mode.

exit_plan_mode.description: Leave planning mode, resume tool access.

enable_tools.description: REQUIRED after search_tools: activate found tool. Without this, found tool UNAVAILABLE. Accept exact name (e.g. "get_weather") or domain prefix (e.g. "domain:Finance"). Ready NEXT turn.

parameters.tools: Tool name or domain prefix to enable.

disable_tools.description: Deactivate tool to free context. Accept name or domain prefix. Core tool can't be disabled.

parameters.tools: Tool name or domain prefix to disable.

discover_and_enable_tools.description: Search ALL tool ({{totalToolCount}}) AND enable match in one step. Found tool ready next turn. Covers: {{domainListLowercase}}.

parameters.query: Search term for tool name/description. e.g. {{sampleKeywords}}.

create_skill.description: Create reusable workflow recipe. Skill = saved instruction with {{variable}} placeholder. Capture multi-step workflow as single action. Persists across session.

parameters.name: Unique skill name. Serves as ID.
parameters.prompt: Instruction to execute. Use {{variable}} for placeholder.

execute_skill.description: Run skill by ID. Instruction populated with variable and executed.

enter_worktree.description: Enter isolated worktree. Creates branch, redirects tool to separate directory. For risky change or experiment. exit_worktree to merge/discard.

exit_worktree.description: Leave worktree. 'merge' to keep, 'discard' to drop.

parameters.commitMessage: Commit message for merge. Auto-generated if omitted.

write_todo.description: Write/update todo list. Track multi-step work with persistent checklist. Call with full updated list — replaces previous.

summarize_conversation.description: Compress conversation into summary. Use when conversation long. Stored for future turn.

parameters.summary: Compressed summary: key decision, file changed, task status, remaining.

ask_user.description: Ask user question, wait for response. For clarification or confirmation before major action. Loop pauses until answered. Up to 4 question per call.

list_mcp_resources.description: List resource from connected MCP server.

parameters.server_name: MCP server name. Omit for all.

read_mcp_resource.description: Read resource from MCP server by URI.

set_timer.description: Set wait timer for in-session pause. For async op, build check, retry. Fires prompt back after duration. 30-599s. For reminder/alarm: use create_cron_job.

list_timers.description: List active timer. For reminder: list_cron_jobs.

cancel_timer.description: Cancel active timer. For cron: delete_cron_job.

search_conversations.description: Search past session using natural language. Semantic match returns title, summary, date, memory count. Use for 'remember when...' or prior context.

parameters.query: Search term. e.g. 'MCP debug', 'WebSocket drop fix'.
